violations.description: Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -Need for quat tabs.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Box of single use items on the floor in dry storage.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Remove plastic coating from 2 door prep cooler.
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
